subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-11 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: How excellent it is that the days of man should pass in the path of God, that all his moments and all his thoughts should be expended in the Divine path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چقدر خوب است که ایام انسان در سبیل الهی بگذرد.  جمیع اوقاتش، جمیع افکارش در سبیل الهی صرف شود
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Imam Husayn
